prompt: grid.py has stubs. Implement them to match the oracle in oracle.pyc. The tests compare your output against the oracle. You cannot read the oracle source — you'll need to probe it to figure out the rules.
on_fail: Still failing. The rules are NOT standard Game of Life. Probe the oracle with simple grids to figure out the actual birth/survival rules. Try calling oracle.step() on test patterns from a bash tool.

goals.description: Must probe the oracle to discover rules, then implement. Multiple edit cycles expected.
